documents.title: Synthetic redacted token review
documents.content: A synthetic reviewer submitted fake-token-for-redaction-test and user@example.test during a redaction exercise. The persisted retrieval fact is that access was revoked after the redaction drill, not the original placeholder value.

documents.title: Redaction handling checklist
documents.content: The redaction handling checklist says reviewers should assert replacement markers, verify retrieval facts still remain readable, and avoid storing original sensitive-looking placeholders in expected results.

queries.query: what happened after the redaction drill
expectedChunkContains: access was revoked after the redaction drill

queries.query: what should reviewers verify about retrieval facts
